situation: audit-cycle-state.json listed 2 pending derived_fixes (H-COVERAGE-001-crate1-factor-registry, H-COVERAGE-001-crate2-replay) referencing fix_case_id=case-2026-07-07-105. Both claimed worktree commits cdc2ab6/7581bc1 in opt-moni-master-1783105913 had NOT been merged to master and that ~17 .lock().unwrap() calls remained across 5 crates.
action: Verified ground truth: (1) case-2026-07-07-105.json does not exist on disk — phantom reference. (2) grep -rn '.lock().unwrap()' --include='*.rs' crates/ on master returns 0 matches (non-test AND test). (3) Same grep on worktree opt-moni-master-1783105913 also returns 0. (4) Master HEAD=b877104 already includes 'fix(sessions): recover from Mutex poisoning instead of cascade panic (MM-M003)' and 2e28a5f 'fix(strategy): MM-M001 recover poisoned Mutex in StrategyRegistry.list_definitions'. Audit-035's H-COVERAGE-001 was a false positive — it re-scanned the same vulnerability class already fixed by b877104+2e28a5f and misread the residual count. Both derived_fixes rejected as phantom; no code change needed.
outcome_evidence: grep '.lock().unwrap()' on moni-master/crates/ returns 0 matches (both master HEAD=b877104 and worktree HEAD=7581bc1). case-2026-07-07-105.json absent from .claude/decisions/. Master git log shows b877104 + 2e28a5f already address the Mutex poisoning class. audit-cycle-state.json derived_fixes[0,1].status updated pending→rejected.
next_suggestion: All workspace git projects audited ≥1×; moni-master now audited 4× (most covered). Next full audit should target least-covered projects or wait for new post-audit commits.
shizi PROGRESS.md stale 7.8 days (scout #1) — refresh if user cares about shizi visibility.
personal-assistant has 17 pending worktrees — consider archival sweep next scout round.

audit_findings.finding: derived_fixes[0].fix_case_id='case-2026-07-07-105' is a phantom reference — file does not exist. Same for derived_fixes[1] at line 24. Root cause: prior scout round wrote case ID to audit-cycle-state before actually creating the case JSON file, and the case creation step failed/was skipped without rolling back the state entry.
audit_findings.remediation: Both entries marked status=rejected this round. Process fix: future dispatch must atomically create case file BEFORE writing fix_case_id to audit-cycle-state, or use a two-phase write (create case → verify exists → update state).
